page_metadata.biotools__summary: Systematic assembly of data on Drosophila melanogaster eye development. It consists of data on eye development obtained from the literature, and a web interface for users to interactively display these data as a gene regulatory network.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Systematic assembly of data on Drosophila melanogaster eye development. It consists of data on eye development obtained from the literature, and a web interface for users to interactively display these data as a gene regulatory network.
